item.title: Her Own "Friends" Did This to Her | Reena Virk
item.description: Reena Virk was at a party under a bridge in Saanich, B.C. with a group of fellow teenagers. She had been bullied for a little while now but little did she know what some of the gang had in store for her on that fateful day. What are your thoughts on this chilling story?

media:content.media:title: Her Own "Friends" Did This to Her | Reena Virk
media:content.media:description: Reena Virk was at a party under a bridge in Saanich, B.C. with a group of fellow teenagers. She had been bullied for a little while now but little did she know what some of the gang had in store for her on that fateful day. What are your thoughts on this chilling story?

item.title: Eleanor Williams Kept Lying About Everything
item.description: In May 2020, a young woman in Barrow-in-Furness, Cumbria, posted a graphic account onFacebook, detailing the years of abuse.The post, complete with photos of the serious injuries she had suffered, rapidly went viral. These latest allegations followed earlier scandals in the north of England, increasing racial tensions and incidences of hate crime at a time of heightened unrest due to Covid lockdown. However, as police investigated these latest allegations, they quickly discovered that everything was not as it seemed. This is what happens when baseless lies and false accusations lead to trial by social media. This is the case of Eleanor Williams!

media:content.media:title: Eleanor Williams Kept Lying About Everything
media:content.media:description: In May 2020, a young woman in Barrow-in-Furness, Cumbria, posted a graphic account onFacebook, detailing the years of abuse.The post, complete with photos of the serious injuries she had suffered, rapidly went viral. These latest allegations followed earlier scandals in the north of England, increasing racial tensions and incidences of hate crime at a time of heightened unrest due to Covid lockdown. However, as police investigated these latest allegations, they quickly discovered that everything was not as it seemed. This is what happens when baseless lies and false accusations lead to trial by social media. This is the case of Eleanor Williams!

item.title: 10 yo Girl Missing- Then Mom Calls 911 To Arrest Her Son
item.description: What happened to Jessica Ridgeway is a heartbreaking reminder of how vulnerable children can be and how quickly tragedy can strike. Her community fought for answers, and justice was finally delivered, but the pain of her loss remains. How can we better protect kids and spot danger before it’s too late?

media:content.media:title: 10 yo Girl Missing- Then Mom Calls 911 To Arrest Her Son
media:content.media:description: What happened to Jessica Ridgeway is a heartbreaking reminder of how vulnerable children can be and how quickly tragedy can strike. Her community fought for answers, and justice was finally delivered, but the pain of her loss remains. How can we better protect kids and spot danger before it’s too late?

item.title: Pokémon Cards Used To Trap His Stepsister
item.description: She trusted her older stepbrother to take her out to buy Pokémon cards, unaware it was a lie that led to her murder with a metal pipe. How does a family bond become the setting for such a devastating betrayal?

media:content.media:title: Pokémon Cards Used To Trap His Stepsister
media:content.media:description: She trusted her older stepbrother to take her out to buy Pokémon cards, unaware it was a lie that led to her murder with a metal pipe. How does a family bond become the setting for such a devastating betrayal?
